title: Chapter 34
text: ALSO BY BRYNNE WEAVER Dark Contemporary Stand-alones Marrow Rival serial killers battle for hunting ground at West Paine University. Black Sheep Serial killer Bria Brooks becomes entangled with Forensic Psychology professor Elijah Kaplan as they hunt an elusive cult leader. Other Works - 2023 Release The Poison Pastry Bakery – anticipated release date 7 Sep 2023 – Why Choose dark comedy contemporary romance The Shadow Realm Series - (completed) Siren vampire Lu accidentally binds herself to her most dangerous enemy, the demon bounty hunter Ashen. A Shadow In The Reaping (book 1) A Heart Of Bitter Poison (book 2) A Queen Of Broken Realms (book 3) Monster Smut Novellas (aka Brynne takes down twitter trolls) Exterminatrix The Diviner Series (dark fantasy romance) The Diviner The Elysian - coming soon, date TBC The Resurrectionist – planned
